title: Calcium chloride
summary: A soluble calcium salt — the calcium source in the precipitation lesson. The 1:2 subscript is charge balance: one $\mathrm{Ca^{2+}}$ needs two $\mathrm{Cl^-}$ to cancel. The molar mass counts the two chlorines, so it is not just calcium plus chlorine.
notes: The subscript 2 comes from crossing the charges (+2 and -1), a machine-verified step in the Valence Table formula builder.
